checkedConditions: Provider runtime state revision changes publish debounced ModelsUpdated events via bump_provider_runtime_state_revision().
Publish hook covers cooldown record/clear/expiry and backpressure permit acquire/release because all visible runtime state transitions use the shared revision bump helper.
Focused test provider_runtime_state_revision_publishes_models_updated proved a provider runtime state bump emits BusEvent::ModelsUpdated through the debounced bus.
Focused verification, cargo fmt/check, cargo check, git diff --check, selfdev build and reload all passed.
uncheckedConditions: Provider runtime state revision changes publish debounced ModelsUpdated events.
Publish hook covers cooldown record/clear/expiry and backpressure permit acquire/release via the shared revision bump helper.
Focused tests prove a runtime state bump emits/coalesces ModelsUpdated through the bus.
Focused tests, cargo fmt/check, cargo check, selfdev build/reload, governance, commit/push, and issue #27 update pass.
notes: Publishing is intentionally done in the shared revision bump helper. The bus's existing publish_models_updated debounce coalesces bursts from cooldown/backpressure transitions before remote clients receive AvailableModelsUpdated.
